verses.text: Sakhi in tuiluang sialsial a lunggulh bangin nang ka hong lunggulh hi, ka Pasian aw
A nungta Pasian kong deih hi. Cik ciangin kei hong pai-in Pasian' maitang hong mu thei ding ka hi hiam
Mite in keima tungah, “Na Pasian koi-ah om ahi hiam?” hong cihcih sungteng, sun leh zanin ka khitui an-in ka ne hi
Ka lungsim sung ka suahkhia a, pawi bawl mihon khat kipakin otna leh nuamna la tawh Pasian' inn-ah ka makaihna, mihonpi tawh ka paina ka phawkkik hi
Bang hangin khakunkun a, lunghimawh niloh ka hi hiam? Pasian' sungah lametna nei ning; bang hang hiam cih leh kei a hong huh ka Pasian ka phatkik ngawn ding hi
Ka lungsim tamkham ahih manin Jordan leh Hermon gam, Mizar mualtung panin nang ka hong phawk hi
Nangma tuizeu gingte khatlekhat kidawng uh a, dahna tuihualte in kei a hong tuum hi
Topa in sun tawntungin a itna kip hong lak a, zan hun ciangin nuntakna a hong pia Pasian' tungah thungetna la ka sa hi
“Bang hangin kei hong mangngilh na hi hiam? Galte in hong sukcip manin bang hangin kapin kidikdik ka hi hiam?” ci-in ka Pasian, kei a hong huhpa' tungah ka gen hi
Ka langte in kei tungah, “Na Pasian koi-ah om ahi hiam?” hong cihcih sungteng, ka sungah meima nai tawm bangin hong tum ngangngang hi
Bang hangin khakunkun a, lunghimawh niloh ka hi hiam? Pasian' sungah lametna nei ning; bang hang hiam cih leh kei a hong huh ka Pasian ka phatkik ngawn ding hi.
